station_address: Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, Nityanand Nagar, Ghatkopar East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400086
text:
I came to the pump today. Pump was absolutely empty and nobody still came to fill in the fuel. All seated busy watching mobile. I am it's irritating. We are busy. I left and actually filled fuel in pump 250 mts away.

Spoilt my morning and experience.

text:

I hope you take immediate action to address this issue and improve customer experience.

text: I lost my bag along with my belongings and very graciously the owner and employees genuinely kept the bag for 2 days. I collected it today really very rare to find honest bunch of people in this day and age . I would recommend people to purchase petrol from this petrol pump really honest and genuine people working here.

text:
One of the best and spacious petrol pump station in ghatkopar west. Their is enough space for parking and and huge area for many vehicles to enter and fuel their vehicles.
Also the lightings and decoration of the place is well maintained.
Staffs are good always and yes the place is almost connected to adjoining highway

station_address: Lal Bahadur Shastri Marg, Nityanand Nagar, Ghatkopar East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400086
text: I visited the HP petrol pump near my house yesterday to fill up my car. I was impressed by the quality and quantity of the fuel I received. The meter was accurate and the fuel was clean and efficient. The pump premises were also well-maintained and hygienic. The facilities and services were available and functional. I especially appreciated the free air and water service. The staff and attendants were courteous and helpful. They assisted me with the payment and gave me a receipt. The pricing was reasonable and competitive. I paid with my credit card without any hassle. I was very satisfied and happy with my experience at the HP petrol pump. I would definitely recommend it to others and visit again in the future.
